sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86465" key="proaitia/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαιτιάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n86465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accuse beforehand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινὰ εἶναι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:3:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
